title: Act 2 Part 3 - The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II Walkthrough
markdown:
### December 23

* * *

[![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/e3/ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

| Recipe: Rich Carbonara | Purchase the Pasta Recipe Book from the General Store (Ymir) or from Dorothee. |
| --- | --- |
| Recipe: Tomato Stew | Farlan: Schwarz Drache Barrier. |
| Book: Gambler Jack II - Chapter 11 | Rex: Schwarz Drache Barrier. |
| Book: Black Records #4 | Norton: Roer Airport, after clearing "Gone Air" quest. (Second Playthrough only) |

\- Advertisement -

| Name | Requirements |
| --- | --- |
| Angelica [Page 1] | Automatic. |
| Angelica [Page 2] | Speak to Angelica at Courageous 1F - Workshop. |
| Alan [Page 2] | Speak to Alan at Courageous 4F - Sword Training Facility. |
| Beryl [Page 1] | Speak to Beryl near Terra Shrine (Garrelia Byroad) |
| Emily [Page 2] | Speak to Emily at Courageous 4F - S. Range Training Facility. |
| Nicholas [Page 2] | Speak to Nicholas after you have recruited Margarita. |
| Klein [Page 1] | Speak to Klein at Courageous 5F - Bridge after the "Gone Air" quest. |
| Rex [Page 1] | Speak to Rex at Schwarz Drache Barrier. |
| Character | Requirements | Location | Role in Courageous |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Hibelle [Page 1] | Finished the "Gone Air" Quest | Eisengard Range | Unlocked the Arts Training Facility (4F) for you to use. |
| Hugo [Page 1] | Recruited Hugo to Courageous. | RF Store (Roer) | Opens a premium store for Courageous. |
| Kenneth [Page 1] | Recruited Kenneth to Courageous | Nortia Highway 3 | Lets you exchange fishing points. |
| Margarita [Page 1] | Recruited Margarita to Courageous | Schwarz Drache Barrier - Resting Area | Giving Margarita a Peculiar Dish, she will reward you with items.Give every Peculiar Dish, and Margarita will reward you with a rare quartz. |
| Stefan [Page 1] | Recruited Stefan to Courageous | Roer Institute of Technology | Gives you a reward based on the amount of data collected on your battle notes |

When you regain control, Speak to **Towa** twice on the Bridge. A list of new locations will be added, such as **Eisengard Range,** and **Roer Region**. After that go to 4th floor, and speak to **Emily** and **Alan** at the training facility, this will update their character profiles. You can also speak to Alfin for a short event. After that, head to the second floor and speak to **Dorothee** and purchase the "**Pasta**" recipe from her. Also play some **Blade** with your friends to build your Link EXP between them. Then head to the first floor and speak to **Angelica**, this will update her profile.

Note: The final two [Cryptid](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") will also appear, there is one located in Nortia Highway 2 and Eisengard Mountain 2.

Head to the second floor to the **Infirmary**, examine the card on the desk to start one of the side quests.

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: The Sweetest of Challenges

* * *

When the quest starts, Class VII will gather at the meeting room. Listen to everyone's opinion and then repeat it again. After that, you will need to select the Culprit. Pick the 2nd choice, Machias it will give you 2 extra AP.

Note: Picking Emma will give you just 1 AP on the latest Japanese patch.

| Client | Phantom Thief Bleublanc |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Thief Cloak, 3500 Mira, 3 (+1-2) AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Afterwards, you should focus on recruiting the remaining students of Thors. Go to the **Roer** first.

Obtain any of the trial chest you were missing from the previous act.

**Trial Chest Locations**

*   **Spina Byroad** - Alisa & Emma
*   **Nortia Highway** - Elliot, Emma, Millium & Sara
*   **Sachsen Mountain** - Elliot & Gaius

Afterwards, go to the **RF Store** and speak to **Hugo**. Accept his request and then leave Roer. Go to **Legram** and speak to **Watteau's Store** and talk to **Watteau**. Then go to **Ymir's General Store** and speak to **Lio**. You should also visit the snowboard area, a new course has been added. Return back to Roer and speak to **Hugo**. Hugo will join Courageous and will open up the premium store allowing you to buy some of the best accessories of the game at a hefty price.

Go to the **Roer Institute of Technology** (Northwest Building 2F). Speak to **Ratto** on the top corner. Accept his request, leave town by going to **Nortia Highway 2**. Head to the southwest corner of the map to find **Stefan**. **Bring Machias in your party** to trigger an event battle. Afterwards, Stefan will join Courageous. You could also fight the Cryptid, [Agnagarn](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses#Agnagarn "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") on the southeast end of Nortia Highway 2 if you think you can beat it.

Then go to **Nortia Highway 3**, and on the fishing spot location (Northwest of the map), you will find **Kenneth**. Speak to him and accept his request, then use the fishing spot that is right beside you and **catch a Glutinous Bass**. When you successfully catch one, speak to Kenneth and he will join Courageous.

Travel to **Schwarz Drache Barrier** (Southwest exit of Nortia Highway 3). Speak to **Rex** near the gate entrance, it will update his character bio and he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 11**. Then go inside the resting area, speak to **Margarita** with **Millium** in your party. Margarita will join Courageous. Giving Margarita a Peculiar Dish will reward you with items and a rare quartz if you manage to give her every single Peculiar Dish. Then speak to the lady by the counter, she will teach you the "[Tomato Stew](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Recipe_List#Tomato_Stew "walkthrough/Recipe List")" recipe. Return to Courageous on the cafeteria section, speak to **Nicholas** to update his character profile. Return to the bridge and speak to Towa. Set your destination to **Eisengard Range** to start one of the side quest.

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Gone Air

* * *

Watch the event scene, you automatically fight two Jaegers to start. After that, you will end up in the same airship from the end of Chapter 1. Pick up the Freeze Quartz from the treasure chest in the Northwest corner, if you forgot it from the previous chapter. Take the southwest entrance to enter the lobby room. You will fight another group of Jaegers. Defeat them and visit the room located northwest. Defeat the single Jaeger to get a Card Key 1 from him. Examine the Bridge door to the north then visit the 3rd floor by taking the southeast entrance. You will fight four more Jaegers. Defeat them to get Card Key 2. Go to the south end entrance to the 4th floor. Defeat the five Jaegers to finish the quest. Klein and Hibelle will also join Courageous.

If this is your **second playthrough or higher**, speak to **Norton** at **Roer's Airport** to receive a copy of **Black Records #4**.

[![Trails of cold steel ii black records 4.jpg](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/eb/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_black_records_4.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_black_records_4.jpg)

| Client | Klein and Hibelle |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Wrath, 4000 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

When you return to the **Courageous**, speak to **Klein** at the bridge to update his profile.

Then revisit Eisengard Mountains, on the landing spot, there is a **Trial Chest** for Fie and Laura. Clear it to unlock the Overdrive Function for them.

|  |
| --- |
| Rolling Rock | HP: 42809 | Item Drop: Crescent Mirror R |
| Elemental Efficacy | 160, 100, 140, 80 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★☆☆☆ Thrust: ★★☆☆ Pierce: ★☆☆☆ Strike:★★★★ |
| Preparation | Quartz: Strong Earth Arts, Tearal |
| This boss has very high physical defense. It is best to have Fie using arts since you don't have many defensive options with this team. The boss is also very vulnerable to attacks that cause faint, take advantage of Fie's Scud Wing or Laura's Brilliant Spin to take an extra turn. Make sure you have someone equipped with Tearal to heal yourself, the boss can hit pretty hard. When you reduce the Boss's HP below 50%, use your S-Craft to finish it off. |

  
When you cleared the Trial Chest, you can also find three new enemies in Eisengard Range. The Shadow Dancer, Venom Demon, and Steel Golem. You can also fight the final Cryptid, [Lindbaum](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses#Lindbaum "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") in the same area where you start a new game. If you manage to kill all five [Cryptids](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses "walkthrough/Optional Bosses"), speak to **Alfin** to get the **Medal of Strength** from her. Return to Courageous. Speak to Towa and set your destination to **Celdic**. Go to East Celdic Highway 2, to get to **North Kreuzen Highway 3** to finish one of the side quest.

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Kreuzen for a Bruisin'

* * *

You will find the quest monster located at the southwest end of North Kreuzen Highway.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Abearddon | 132446 (Normal) | 120, 90, 120, 80 | N/A | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| This is actually one of the easiest boss for farming Link Attacks due its high HP and Unbalance efficacy. If the boss attacks, it will use a rolling attack that can hit your party pretty hard. Because the boss is very slow, you won't need to worry about it too much, make sure you have someone to fully heal your party members before it can use it's roll attack. |

When you defeat the boss, you will receive an **Intimidation** quartz.  
|-

| Client | Prince Olivert |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Intimidation, 3000 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

### Shrine Trials Part A

* * *

For the main story, you will need to revisit all the Shrines again. There will be a new Trial area that you can access. You will need to bring **Emma** to your party to access these new areas. All the Shrines are highlighted with a red exclamation mark on the world map. Select one of the four Shrines, once you clear one of the four there will be a story event that interrupts you. You will eventually finish the remaining three shrines later.

**Terra Shrine - Trial**

At the entrance to the Terra Shrine, you will find **Beryl**, speak to her to update her character profile page 1. Then go inside the Shrine. Use the warp device to get to the trial area. You will need Emma in your party to trigger the event scene to unlock the gate.

[![Trails of cold steel ii terra shrine trail 01.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/thumb/8/8f/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_01.png/190px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_01.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_01.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii terra shrine trail 02.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/thumb/8/8f/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_02.png/260px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_02.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_02.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii terra shrine trail 03.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/thumb/0/00/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_03.png/180px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_03.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_terra_shrine_trail_03.png)

| Enemy List | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Dark Papillon | Hearty Powder | Curia Balm |
| Order Obelisk | EP Charge II | U-Material |
| Dissolution Slug | Honey Syrup | Clear Gelatin |
| Minos Demon | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Tildawn - Gaia | Curia Balm | U-Material |
| Treasure List | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Earth Sepith x1000 | Terra Shrine - Proving Grounds |
| Ancient Glyph |
| Tear All Balm |
| Genbu |
| Earth Bell |

Follow the straight path all the way to the end, you will find some **Earth Sepith** in a treasure chest. Then run back to the center, you will notice a giant wall, you will need to bring someone with a strike proficiency of **B** or higher (**Laura**, **Millium**, or **Machias**). Hit that wall, it will make it drop, creating a bridge for you. Continue the linear path all the way to very top, you will find an **Ancient Glyph** in a treasure chest. Go downstairs, and move to the east path, and you will find another wall near an enemy. Smack the wall to make a bridge. Then go to the northwest corner to find a **Tear All Balm** in a treasure chest. Then follow the east path, and around near the bottom east corner, you can find a ladder, go down from there and on the end of the path you will find three treasure chest. A **Genbu** Quartz in the monster chest and **two Trial Chests**, one each for Alisa/Fie and Machias/Millium.

| TC Boss (Alisa/Fie) | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Minos Lord | 62400 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100, 120, 140, 100 | Yggdrasil R | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Minos Demon x2 | 23750 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100, 120, 140, 100 | Red Beast Flesh, U-Material | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Preparation | Evasion tank build on Fie if possible. (Read Nereid Section for how to make an Evasion Tank) |
| Each monster have the ability to breath out gas that will cause blind. If you have an evasion tank ready, this shouldn't be a problem. Have Fie go to the front, while Alisa should remain on the back, casting arts. If you do not have an evasion setup, then use Heavenly Gift to gain insight allowing you to dodge attacks with ease. |

| TC Boss (Machias/Millium) | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Dino Slug | 46944 (Normal) | 80, 160, 60, 140, 100, 100, 100 | Shield Breaker II | ★★★★ | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| Dissolution Slug x5 | 8366 (Normal) | 80, 160, 60, 140, 100, 100, 100 | Honey Syrup, Clear Gelatin | ★★★★ | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| Since you will be surrounded by a lot of slugs, the best thing to do is to quickly buff up Millium and spam your S-Break before the situation gets dangerous. If you don't want to use that strategy, using Faint ailment works very effectively on the boss. |

Then go upstairs all the way to the end. You will find an **Earth Bell** Quartz on the a treasure chest. Go back upstairs, you will see another wall for you to hit. Hit the wall to create a bridge. Cross over to find an **Orbment Station** and a **Warp Point**. Enter the gate to fight a boss. The boss is based on how many Shrines you have cleared. For your first run, read the [End of 1st Shrine](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#End_of_1st_Shrine "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") section, any further, read [Shrine Trials Part B](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Shrine_Trials_Part_B "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4").

When you defeated the boss, go to the top and grab the **Zemurian Crystal** to clear Terra Shrine.

**Aria Shrine - Trial**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aria shrine trail.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/1/1c/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aria_shrine_trail.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aria_shrine_trail.png)

| Enemy List | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Stone Stalker | Hearty Powder | U-Material |
| Clay Doll | Teara Balm | U-Material |
| Star Lambda | Chitinous Shell | Clear Gelatin |
| Cherubic Gate | EP Charge II | U-Material |
| Tildawn Pazu | Curia Balm | U-Material |
| Treasure List | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Ragna Vortex | Aria Shrine - Proving Grounds |
| Wind Bell |
| Celestial Balm EX |
| Wind Sepith x2000 |
| Zeus Gem |

Go inside Aria Cave, then take the warp to the midpoint. Head to the gate to get to the trial area. Head to the north end, you will find a strange green switch. You will someone with a **B Rank proficiency of Piecing** (Alisa, Fie, Machias, Sara) to activate the switch. Activate the switch to raise the elevator up. Travel to the center area, then take the south path, activate the switch to lower the platform. You will find a **Ragna Vortex** quartz in a treasure chest. Return to the previous area and take the northeast path. Activate the switch to go up. Go to the south end to find a treasure that contains a **Wind Bell**. Travel to the northeast area, you will find a **Celestial Balm EX**, from here go west, you will find a switch, activate to create a piece of the bridge of the center. Then take the southwest path, activate the switch to lower the platform. Go to the west area, activate the switch to get up. From here, go to the southwest end, activate the switch to get down. You will find a **Zeus Gem** inside a Monster Chest.

| Nightmare Tip |
| --- |
| DO NOT LEAVE ARIA Shrine - TRIAL GROUNDS WITHOUT THE ZEUS GEM. This quartz is essential if you want the Cancelling strategy to work on the Final Dungeon bosses, especially McBurn. |

There is two Trial Chest in the same spot, one is for **Fie/Millium** and the other for **Jusis/Sara**.

| TC Boss (Fie/Millium) | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Clay Doll Omega | 50016 (Normal) | 180, 100, 40, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Judgement Bolt R | ★☆☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| Clay Doll x2 | 12947 (Normal) | 180, 100, 40, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Teara Balm, U-Material | ★☆☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| Preparation | Evasion tank build on Fie if possible. (Read Nereid Section for how to make an Evasion Tank) |
| This boss is super easy if you created an Evasion tank Fie. Just have Fie lure the mobs away, and use Scud Wing to faint the mobs or instantly kill them. The focus on the main boss, if the boss decides to cast magic, cancel it with Fie's Sweep skill. Millium should use her Buster Arm skill for a chance to cause faint on the boss. If you don't have an evasion tank, then use Fie's Flash Grenade skill to blind the boss to give you the best chance to dodge. |

| TC Boss (Jusis/Sara) | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Heavy Stalker | 46944 (Normal) | 100, 120, 40, 140, 100, 100, 100 | Leg Breaker II | ★☆☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★★ |
| Stone Stalker x7 | 11044 (Normal) | 100, 120, 40, 140, 100, 100, 100 | Hearty Powder, U-Material | ★☆☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★★ |
| Preparation | Quartz: Quartz with Strong Wind Arts.Accessory: Faint resistant accessory. |
| Make sure you party members are equipped with Faint resistant accessory before this fight. Getting hit by a single mob will cause your character to faint, and getting hit again will only extend the faint duration making it a game over. Use either your strongest wind arts to instantly wipe out the trash mobs, or someone's S-Craft. When its only the boss remaining, just use Jusis' Platinum Shield to block any incoming. Then have Sara as your main source of damage. |

Then go to the north area to find some Wind Sepith in a treasure chest. Then to the east side there is another switch. Activate the switch to complete the bridge in the center. Take the center exit to get to the boss room. If this is your first Spirit Shrine Trial, then read the [End of 1st Shrine](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#End_of_1st_Shrine "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") section, if not then read the [Shrine Trials Part B](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Shrine_Trials_Part_B "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4") section. When the boss is defeated, head upstairs and grab the Zemurian Crystal to clear Aria Shrine.

**Aqua Shrine - Trial**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aqua shrine trial.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/e4/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aqua_shrine_trial.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aqua_shrine_trial.png)

| Enemy List | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Giragance | White Beast FIesh | Chitinous Shell |
| Gust Frog | Clear Gelatin | Globby Fat |
| Keraclone | White Beast Flesh | Chitinous Shell |
| Great Sharkodile | White Beast FIesh | U-Material |
| Tildawn Glacia | Curia Balm | U-Material |
| Treasure List | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Maelstrom | Aqua Shrine - Proving Grounds |
| Yaksha |
| EP Charge IV |
| Curia Balm |
| Water Bell |
| Water Sepith x1000 |

Go inside Aqua Shrine, take the warp portal to the mid point. Approach the gate for an event scene. Enter to get to the Trial Area. Follow the path to the end, you will find a switch. The switch requires someone with a **B rank proficiency in Thrust** (Fie, Gaius, Jusis, Sara) to activate. When the switch is activated, the water will drain, climb down the ladder. Head to the southeast end of the map, you will find a switch, activate it to drain the water below. Then climb up ladder nearby, you will find a **Maelstrom** quartz in a treasure chest. Then take the ladder on the center, climb down, and take ladder on the northwest corner, climb up to find a monster chest with a Yaksha quartz. There is two Trial Chest here as well, one of them requires **Alisa/Machias** and the other is **Laura/Millium**.

| TC Boss (Laura/Millium) | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Grand Ghastly | 45984 (Normal) | 80, 60, 120, 120, 100, 100, 100 | Spirit Breaker II | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Gust Frog x4 | 9790 (Normal) | 80, 60, 120, 120, 100, 100, 100 | Clear Gelatin, Globby Fat | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| This is one of the easiest Trial Chest boss. Because both characters have very high STR, using your S-Craft is enough wipe out all mobs. If you don't have enough CP for a S-Craft, then use area type craft skills. |

| TC Boss (Alisa/Machias) | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Gigantic Sharkodile | 77760 (Normal) | 120, 180, 80, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Crystal Flood R | ★★☆☆ | ★★★★ | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| Preparation | Quartz: Quartz with the Earth Pulse ability.Accessory: Faint resistant accessory. |
| Have Machias grab the boss' attention. When the boss is focused on attacking Machias, cast Earth Pulse on Machias, so that Machias can regenerate HP each turn. The boss can restore a bit of it's HP each time it strikes. Have Alisa to cast arts for your main source of damage, if Machias HP drops too low, have Alisa heal him with Saint Arrow. Make sure to cast Earth Pulse again if the effects expire. |

Then go back down, and go to the south end of the map, to find a **Curia Balm**. Afterwards, head to the north end of the map, you will see another switch, activate it to drain the water. Take the ladder at the southeast corner of the map, you will find a **Water Bell** quartz in a chest. Climb back up and on the very southeast end of the map there is an **EP Charge IV** in a treasure chest. From here go to the northwest end of the map, there is a ladder here, go down and head to the northeast end for another switch. Activate it to drain the water. Then go back down, and take the ladder nearby, you will find a lot of **water sepith** in a treasure chest. Climb back up, then go to the northeast end of the map to get to the boss room. If this is your first Spirit Shrine Trial, then read the [End of 1st Shrine](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#End_of_1st_Shrine "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") section, if not then read the [Shrine Trials Part B](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Shrine_Trials_Part_B "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4") section. When the boss is defeated, head upstairs and grab the Zemurian Crystal to clear Aqua Shrine.

**Ignis Shrine - Trial**

[![Trails of cold steel ii ignis shrine trial.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/5/59/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ignis_shrine_trial.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_ignis_shrine_trial.png)

| Enemy List | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Magma Drome | Clear Gelatin | U-Material |
| Soul Geist | Clear Gelatin | Globby Fat |
| Hinomikoto | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Surtr | Clear Gelatin | U-Material |
| Tildawn Flamme | Curia Balm | U-Material |
| Treasure List | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Fire Sepith x1000 | Ignis Shrine - Proving Grounds |
| Purgatorial Flame |
| Fire Bell |
| Carnage |

Head inside the Ignis Shrine and go downstairs to enter the Trial area. Go to the northwest corner, and examine the lamp. Put the flame out with Rean's field attack, this will create a bridge to the east. Cross through and head to the southeast corner to find some **Fire Sepith** in a treasure chest. Then find fire switch at the northeast corner. Put out the flame to activate the north bridge. Go there, to find another switch, activate it to create the other half of the bridge. Behind the switch, climb the ladder round the corner, you will a **Purgatorial Flame** quartz in a treasure chest. Then go to the west side of the map, on the southwest corner, you will find a **Fire Bell** in a treasure chest. Then go to the very northwest corner of the map, you will find a **Carnage** quartz in a monster chest. There is also **two Trial Chests** here, one is for **Alisa/Sara** and the other for **Machias/Emma**.

| TC Boss (Alisa/Sara) | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Homuramikoto | 46848 (Normal) | 100, 180, 20, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Sword Breaker II | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Hinomikoto x2 | 11044 (Normal) | 100, 180, 20, 100, 100, 100, 100 | Red Beast Flesh, U-Material | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Preparation | Quartz: Quartz with Strong Water Arts.Accessory: Burn resistant accessory. |
| This boss likes to Cast Magic, and the whole idea is to prevent it from casting. If the boss manage to cast its magic, it will use Flare Bomb which deal about 10000 to 12000 damage which makes it an instant game over. Make sure you Impede the boss before it has the chance to do that. If you see a Zero arts bonus, use your S-Craft during that moment to prevent the boss from getting the bonus. You can also use Alisa's S-Craft to mute the boss. |

| TC Boss (Emma/Machias) | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Arch Geist | 46752 (Normal) | 60, 180, 20, 100, 180, 120, 180 | Flare Bomb R | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| Soul Geist x4 | 11044 (Normal) | 60, 180, 20, 100, 180, 120, 180 | Clear Gelatin, Globby Fat | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ☆☆☆☆ |
| Preparation | Quartz: Quartz with Strong Water Arts.Accessory: Sleep/Nightmare resistant accessory. |
| This boss likes to Cast Magic, and the whole idea is to prevent it from casting. If the boss manage to cast its magic, it will use Grim Butterfly which deals enough damage to makes it an instant game over. Make sure you Impede the boss before it has the chance to do that. If you see a Zero arts bonus, use your S-Craft during that moment to prevent the boss from getting the bonus. Have Emma use her strongest magic, and if the boss is not using magic, then have Machias use Burst Drive to make Emma's magic cast instantly. The boss is casting, then have Machias Impede it with his Mail Breaker. |

After you have clear the two Trial Chest, go southeast from here to find another fire switch. Put out the flame to create a bridge to the northeast area. Going to there will lead you to the boss room. If this is your first Spirit Shrine Trial, then read the [End of 1st Shrine](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#End_of_1st_Shrine "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") section, if not then read the [Shrine Trials Part B](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Shrine_Trials_Part_B "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4") section. When the boss is defeated, head upstairs and grab the Zemurian Crystal to clear Ignis Shrine.

#### End of 1st Shrine

* * *

At the end of the first Shrine, you will end up fighting Magic Knight Dire Wolf.

|  |
| --- |
| Magic Knight Direwolf | HP: 156170 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★★☆☆ Thrust: ★★☆☆ Pierce: ★★☆☆ Strike:★★☆☆ |
| Boss Skills | Ground Punch - hits a single target.Ground Smash. Targets anyone in front.Boost. Grants boss Str, Def, Spd 25% Up and cures 23000 HP (normal). |
| Dire Wolf is similar to Ortheim, as it possesses an area attack capable of dealing approximately 6000 damage in a straight line. When you've depleted 25% of the boss's HP, it will activate its Boost Up skill, enhancing its strength, defense, speed, and healing itself. Prolonging the battle can be hazardous due to these buffs. As the boss is highly immune to status effects, it's advisable to concentrate on self-buffing for maximum damage output or cast arts against it. |

Leave The Shrine for an event, then speak to George in Courageous 1F. Select the option highlighted in red to advance the main story.

### December 24 & 25

* * *

[![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/e3/ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

| Name | Requirements |
| --- | --- |
| Linde [Page 2] | Speak to Linde at Courageous 5F - Bridge. |
| Loggins [Page 1] | Speak to Loggins at Courageous 4F - Sword Training Facility. |
| Fiedelio [Page 2] | Speak to Fiedelio at Courageous 2F - Computer Room. |
| Instructor Sara [Page 2] | Automatically. |
| Jusis [Page 2] | Automatically |

Jusis and Sara will be fixed party members for the next story segment. Survey all the key events in Celdic. The key event locations are, **Chapel south room**, **Otto** (Manager House 2F), and **Claire** (Army Guardhouse entrance). When you see all three key events, head to the east exit of Celdic to see another event scene then you will be returned to the Courageous. When you regain control, assign your party members, and equip Valimar with the best Ex-Orbs you have for the upcoming battle. Then go and speak to **Fidelio** in the Computer Room (2F), **Loggins** in the Sword Training Facility (4F), and **Linde** on the Bridge (5F). Doing this will update their character profiles.

When your ready, speak to Towa to start the operation.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Idle Stance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Kestrel | 260000 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100 | B:★★☆☆ | H:★☆☆☆ | A:★☆☆☆ |
| Attack Stance (Slash Pose) | Attack Stance (Thrust Pose) |
| B:☆☆☆☆ | H:★★★☆ | A:★☆☆☆ | B:★☆☆☆ | H:☆☆☆☆ | A:★★★☆ |
| This is similar to fighting Neihardt's Spiegel from the previous act. The Kestrel doesn't have a 4 star unbalance rating, but it doesn't hit very hard. There is a pretty high chance you might miss your attacks allowing the Kestrel to counter you. When it switches to one of it's attack stance, you should save CP for your counter ability or stun it with Seal (Last CP ability). Overall not a really hard fight compare to the previous mech battles. |

After this, you will be fighting a group of Jaegers with just instructor Sara. Sara will also unlock her final S-Craft ability, use it against the group of Jaegers, when your CP is fully recharged use it again. After that, you will end up in Auroch Fort without instructor Sara.

**Aurochs Fort**

[![Trails of cold steel ii aurochs fort 01.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/d/db/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_fort_01.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_fort_01.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii aurochs fort 02.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/e6/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_fort_02.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_fort_02.png)

| Enemy List | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Vogel XX | Teara Balm | Curia Balm |
| Beep Seeker III | EP Charge I | U-Material |
| Phalanx J9 | Teara Balm | U-Material |
| Provincial Army Soldier | Teara Balm | EP Charge II |
| Kazakh Doven G | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| B-Zephyranthes | U-Material | EP Charge II |
| Provincial Army Officer | Teara Balm | EP Charge II |
| Treasure List | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Curia Balm | Auroch Fort 1F |
| Cast 2 |
| Celestial Balm EX |
| Tear All Balm |

| Hellfire |

Go to the north path, go all the way to the far east and enter the room directly south. Examine the switch to unlock the gate on the center. Go there, the path will split into three, follow the west path, enter the first room as you go south. You will find a **Curia Balm** inside a treasure chest. Exit out of the room, go all the way to the southwest end to find a **Cast 2** in a chest. Then go back north, and on the center, there will another gate blocking the way, from here go to the northeast path, enter the first room you see, there is a **Celestial Balm EX** in a treasure chest. Exit out of the room and follow the northeast path all the way to the bottom. You will find an air duct, go through the air duct to get to the southeast area. Examine the switch on the left, it will unlock the gate to the center. Go to the center to find the **Hellfire** quartz in a monster chest. Then go to the room located southwest, inside there you can find some **Sepith**. Then take the southeast entrance to get to the 2nd floor.

Follow the north path until you reach to the center. You will notice a gate blocking the center, head to the left side of that gate, you will find an air duct, enter it and you will find a **Chrono Burst** Quartz in a treasure chest. Unlock the gate by pressing the switch beside the treasure. Then travel all the way to the southwest corner, there is another air duct, enter and you will find yourself at the southeast corner of the map. Grab the **Tearal** Quartz in a treasure chest, then press the switch to unlock the gate. Now go all the way to the northwest corner of the map. Then examine the air duct, you will end up and north section. Run to the southeast corner, press the switch nearby to unlock the gate below you. Go past the gate to find a **HP 2** Quartz. From here, travel all the way to the north end. There is another duct, go through the duct, and then go to the room on the west, you will find an **EP Charge IV** in a chest. Then follow the north path, and there is a room on the northeast end. There is some **U-Materials** in the treasure chest of that room. Leave the room then take the northeast exit to get to the 3rd floor.

Examine the Orbment Station and heal yourself, then fight the boss through the door.

|  |
| --- |
| Duvalie | HP: 203010 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 90, 90, 90, 90 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ☆☆☆☆ Thrust: ★☆☆☆ Pierce: ☆☆☆☆ Strike:★☆☆☆ |
|  |
| Sleipnir x2 | HP: 76000 | Item Drop: Tearal Balm, U-Material |
| Elemental Efficacy | 100, 100, 100, 100 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★★☆☆ Thrust: ★★☆☆ Pierce: ★★☆☆ Strike:★★★☆ |
| Use your S-Craft to eliminate the Sleipnir as soon as possible. Duvalie has a considerable amount of HP, so it won't be a quick takedown. Her attacks can inflict confusion or freeze on your characters. It's a good idea to position your tank or main attacker at the front to draw her attention and prevent her from hitting your entire party with her area-of-effect attacks. When Duvalie's HP falls below 60%, she may unleash her S-Craft, Prism Calibur, which can deal 10,000 to 13,000 damage, resulting in an instant knockout. During this phase, consider having Jusis cast Platinum Shield as a precaution. Another possibility is to use Adamantine Shield. |

When you regain control, go to Alouette Inn in Artisan Street. Speak to **Giolamo** by the counter, he will teach you the **Fruit Parfait** recipe. Then talk to **Maicel** by the table, he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II - Chapter 12**. Then go to the Duke's Mansion, for an event scene. Then go to the room in the west for another event, don't forget to pick up **Windy Colour** from drawer in Jusis' room. Attend the **bonding events**. One of the conditions to trigger the bonding trophy for this game is to attend the bonding event of this date. Keep a backup save file for this point of the game for this reason. Attending **Fie**, **Gaius**, **Machias** and **Towa'**s bonding event will add a page to their profiles. Attending **Alfin'**s bonding event, will also unlock her [final partner event](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_4#Chosen_Partner_Event "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 4") on December 30th. When you're done all your side activities go to Bareahard Airport and enter Courageous to end the day.

The game will accumulate all the AP you have earn throughout this act. If you acquired a total of **38 AP**, you should get a **S Rank**.
